sub_modules.qgemm_quantizer: Combinational FP32-to-quantized vector conversion using Q15 scale and zero-point with unsigned quantized clamping.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer-domain matrix multiplication with zero-point subtraction and INT32 accumulation.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantizer: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization to FP32 using the product of Q15 input scales.
